title: Desktop App Phase 1 Remaining Features â€” Revised

content:
# Desktop App Phase 1 Remaining Features â€” REVISION 2

## Boundary
`desktop-feature-parity-phase1-remaining` â€” Agent config UI, context display, settings polish

## Consumer Purpose
Desktop app users gain the ability to create and edit custom agents (matching TUI functionality), see context pressure/compaction indicators, and navigate settings with search and improved keyboard controls.

---

## SLICE 1 â€” AGENT CONFIGURATION UI (HIGHEST IMPACT)

### Key Architecture Decision
Agent data flows through the sidecar HTTP REST API, NOT Electron IPC. The SDK provides `sdk.app.agents()` but no create/update endpoint. Custom agents must be stored locally in electron-store (named `desktop-custom-agents`) and merged with SDK agents in the UI.

### Files

| File | Action | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `packages/app/src/components/dialog-manage-agents.tsx` | **NEW** | Management dialog listing all agents (SDK + custom) with search, add/edit/delete |
| `packages/app/src/components/dialog-edit-agent.tsx` | **NEW** | Edit form for agent name, prompt, model selection, variant, temperature, top_p, color |
| `packages/app/src/components/settings-agents.tsx` | **NEW** | Settings panel with "Manage Agents" button |
| `packages/app/src/components/dialog-settings.tsx` | **MODIFY** | Add "Agents" tab between Shortcuts and Providers (additive) |
| `packages/app/src/i18n/en.ts` | **MODIFY** | Add agent dialog i18n keys |
| `packages/desktop/src/preload/types.ts` | **MODIFY** | Add `getCustomAgents`/`setCustomAgents` to ElectronAPI (additive, 2 lines) |
| `packages/desktop/src/main/ipc.ts` | **MODIFY** | Add IPC handlers `get-desktop-custom-agents` and `set-desktop-custom-agents` using electron-store (additive, ~8 lines) |

### IPC Channels
- `get-desktop-custom-agents` â†’ returns `AgentDef[]` from store named `desktop-custom-agents`
- `set-desktop-custom-agents` â†’ saves `AgentDef[]` to store

### AgentDef Type
```typescript
type AgentDef = {
  name: string
  prompt?: string
  model?: string
  variant?: string
  temperature?: number
  top_p?: number
  color?: string
}
```
revision_notes: Revision 2 incorporates cartographer findings: agent data flows via SDK not IPC, SessionContextTab already exists, compaction SSE events exist but unlistened, settings already has keyboard nav via Kobalte Tabs, models/shortcuts already have search.
